features: Pipeline Contract Enforcement: @enforced decorator for LangGraph nodes (FASE 1)
Node Contracts Registry: 20 nodes audited with verified requires/produces (FASE 2)
Runtime wrapping: _wrap() applies contracts to all 20 nodes in build_graph() (FASE 3)
CONTRACT_ENFORCE_MODE env var: warn (default) | strict | off — zero overhead in off mode
fixes: BUCO 1: BaseGraphState zero enforcement → @enforced wraps all 20 nodes
BUCO 3: codex_hunters bypasses orthodoxy → orthodoxy fields set on all 3 return paths (FASE 4)
BUCO 5: _check_payload_contract warn-only → raises ValueError in strict mode (FASE 6)
BUCO 6: graph_adapter silent 'blessed' fallback → 'non_liquet' + warning log (FASE 4b)
BUCO 7: Domain extension nodes unwrapped → _wrap() applied in domain loop (FASE 3)
breaking_changes: graph_adapter: Unknown orthodoxy status now defaults to 'non_liquet' instead of 'blessed'
RAG_ENFORCE_MODE=strict now raises ValueError on missing payload.source (was warn-only)
